summary: Task 040 is substantively complete. The required checks passed, the mixed public boundary now fail-closes unsafe or malformed published links in the shared `public-content` layer, the public search/showroom behavior is covered by unit and E2E tests, the repo docs and operator guidance are aligned with the shipped mixed public model, and the remaining note-centric copy debt is explicitly recorded.
satisfied_exit_criteria: `npm run verify` passed in `state/deterministic-checks.json`, including lint, typecheck, build, unit tests, E2E, and embedded startup smoke.
`npm run start:smoke` also passed as a separate rerun in `state/deterministic-checks.json`.

Docs and guidance align with the shipped public wave: `ARCHITECTURE.md`, `docs/FRONTEND.md`, `docs/product-specs/public-home-showroom.md`, `docs/product-specs/public-showroom-search.md`, `docs/QUALITY_SCORE.md`, `docs/RELIABILITY.md`, `docs/SECURITY.md`, and the active task doc all describe the mixed public showroom, title-only homepage search, and fail-closed public-link handling consistently.

The implementation matches that guidance: `src/features/public-content/service.ts` routes public data through the shared boundary, `src/features/public-content/types.ts` revalidates published link URLs, `src/app/page.tsx` consumes the hardened boundary, `tests/unit/public-content.test.ts` protects the malformed/unsafe URL contract, and `tests/e2e/public-home-search.spec.ts` proves unsafe seeded published links stay hidden from `/`.
Remaining debt is explicit in `docs/exec-plans/tech-debt-tracker.md`, including the note-centric mixed-public copy follow-up.
